synopsis: Darth Vader learns that Tyler Lucian, a Rebel deserter, knows the name of the pilot who destroyed the Death Star. The bounty hunter Beilert Valance is on the same trail but for the opposite reason: he wants to prevent Vader from ever learning it. The two confront each other near Lucian's hideout at Rubyflame Lake, and a fierce battle erupts between the two cyborgs. Vader prevails when Valance falls into the corrosive lake waters, allowing the dark lord to press on toward the hideout. But rather than wait for Vader, Lucian throws himself into Rubyflame Lake, killing himself and thwarting Vader's plans.
title: Star Wars (1977) #29: Dark Encounter
